The '''''Riff-Raff''''' was a modified [[Gymsnor-3 light freighter/Legends|Gymsnor-3 light freighter]] owned and operated by [[Korkeal Hai]]. The ''Riff-Raff'' could often be found hauling freight in the [[Minos Cluster/Legends|Minos Cluster]].<ref name="GG6-1" />
